meaning: n.&adj.[核]等剂量(的),等剂量线(的),同等辐射量(的)
examples: The reference dose curve was the isodose curve of 90 %.
A median dose of 20 Gy prescribed to the 80% isodose line was administered in a single fraction.
Objective To investigate correlative question about the same a point but different isodose curve in therapy of cervical carcinoma.
